name: room-scheduler
prompt: The meeting-room scheduler misbehaves in several ways. Rescheduling an existing booking leaves its end time blank, so the slot no longer has a valid finish, and rescheduling an id that was never booked throws an error instead of doing nothing. Meetings that sit back-to-back (one ending exactly when the next begins) are rejected as if they conflict. Generating the room-usage report throws once every room has been tallied. The project also no longer compiles.

diagnostics.message: Type '{ kind: "reschedule"; id: string; start: number; end: number; }' is not assignable to type 'SchedulerEvent'.
